initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk, date_dim.d_year, date_dim.d_moy, SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM web_sales
JOIN customer_demographics ON web_sales.ws_bill_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE customer_demographics.cd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk, date_dim.d_year, date_dim.d_moy
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk,
  date_dim.d_year,
  date_dim.d_moy,
  SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
  web_sales
  JOIN customer_demographics ON web_sales.ws_bill_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
  customer_demographics.cd_dep_count = 6
GROUP BY 
  customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk,
  date_dim.d_year,
  date_dim.d_moy
LIMIT 100
